title: MISSING_COMPILED_BACKEND Guard: Return None When Compiled Extensions Absent
symptom: get_backend_function() crashes with SystemError or ImportError when a compiled C/CUDA .so is missing on NPU. The project has a Python fallback but the dispatch function crashes before reaching it.
root_cause: Multi-backend dispatch functions unconditionally load compiled .so without checking platform availability. On NPU where compiled C/CUDA extensions are absent, this causes SystemError/ImportError that bypasses try/except.
fix_steps: 1. Set flag MISSING_COMPILED_BACKEND = True when compiled .so is absent.
2. Add early return at top of get_backend_function(): if MISSING_COMPILED_BACKEND: return None.
3. Callers already handle None returns by falling back to Python/NPU implementation.
affected_patterns: get_backend_function() or kernel_dispatch() that unconditionally import compiled .so
SystemError: <built-in function ...> returned NULL without setting an error
Multi-backend dispatch functions in backend_utils.py, backends.py, kernel_dispatch.py
antipatterns: Do NOT rely solely on try/except ImportError — some extensions fail with SystemError after loading.
Do NOT remove the compiled backend import code — only guard it.

meta.refiner_reasoning: Deterministic mechanical fix: flag set → safe None return; flag absent → crash. One-line change, universal pattern for any project with compiled extensions on NPU.

classifier.reasoning: Deterministic pattern: flag set → safe None return; flag absent → crash. Applies universally to compiled-extension projects on NPU

problem_description: Projects with compiled C/CUDA backend .so files crash on NPU because the shared library is missing or incompatible. get_backend_function() calls fail with SystemError/ImportError even though pure-Python or torch.npu fallback exists.
rough_fix_approach: Add early-return guard at top of get_backend_function(): if MISSING_COMPILED_BACKEND: return None. Callers already handle None returns by falling back to Python implementation.
name: compiled-backend-guard
